description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named clang-tidy check that runs on push to master branch for specific file paths and on pull request open and synchronize events for the same paths. The workflow should run on an ubuntu-latest environment with a concurrency group that cancels in-progress jobs. It checks out the repository with full history and runs clang-tidy checks using the cpp-linter/cpp-linter-action, disabling clang-format checks and using checks from the .clang-tidy file, while ignoring the 3rdParty directory.
